inputs.name: image
inputs.label: Image (path or data URI)
inputs.description: Image file path or a data URI — e.g. from a Screenshot or Camera Capture node.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Extracted Text
outputs.description: All text recognized in the image.

properties.label: Image Path
properties.placeholder: Path to image file, or leave blank and wire an image input

properties.label: Language
properties.placeholder: eng, fra, deu, chi_sim, … (Tesseract lang code)
